incidents.symptom: Explorer restart during the shortcut-arrow probe caused the desktop to disappear briefly until the shell came back.
incidents.notes: Later guest process checks showed explorer.exe, sihost.exe, and ShellHost.exe running again. This incident should keep future shell-touching probes snapshot-first and shell-checked.

incidents.symptom: Desktop stayed black while Task Manager, explorer, dwm, sihost, ShellHost, and ctfmon were present.
incidents.notes: Recovered by closing Workstation, reverting to baseline-20260325-shell-stable, and reopening the VM. Host capture showed the guest desktop alive again.
